description: Destroy-capability. Pins the shared bypass gate (confirm alone), the region-required rejection, and the SSL delete DELETE by region+label.

cases.name: confirm alone is blocked by the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_object_storage_ssl_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)
